info.title: Noundry.Spinup.Cli
info.description: Simple cross-platform CLI tool for provisioning cloud infrastructure (VMs, Networks, Load Balancers) across AWS, Azure, GCP, and Digital Ocean using Terraform.

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: Spinup - Simple cloud infrastructure provisioning with Terraform

commands.name: provision
commands.description: Provision a new cloud resource (VM, Network, or Load Balancer)

commands.name: plan
commands.description: Show Terraform plan for a resource without applying

commands.name: create
commands.description: Create a new stack from a definition file or template

commands.name: destroy
commands.description: Destroy a stack and all its resources
